OMOP CDM v5.4

person

Table Description

This table serves as the central identity management for all Persons in the database.

User Guide

All records in this table are independent Persons.

ETL Conventions

All Persons in a database needs one record in this table.

CDM Field User Guide ETL Conventions Datatype Required Primary Key Foreign Key FK Table FK Domain
person_id Unique identifier for the person. Assign a unique person_id. integer Yes Yes No
gender_concept_id This field is meant to capture the biological sex at birth of the Person. Use the gender or sex value present in the data. integer Yes No Yes CONCEPT Gender

provider

Table Description

This table contains details about healthcare providers.

CDM Field User Guide ETL Conventions Datatype Required Primary Key Foreign Key FK Table FK Domain
provider_id Unique identifier for the provider. Assign a unique provider_id. integer Yes Yes No
gender_concept_id This field captures the provider gender when available. Map the source gender value when present. integer No No Yes CONCEPT Gender
